rebuild_notes: train_aligned_evidence.json is already included in this directory and is the train-side aligned evidence artifact used by this snapshot.

The historical raw_train path is optional for the current soft-support scripts. If a downstream experiment requires train_top20_raw.json, run: python3 scripts/backbone/export_primekg_train_candidates.py
The old_*_evidence paths document provenance from the original research run and are not required by scripts/soft_support.
important_note: Prompts were regenerated from raw candidate lists; subgraphs were copied from matched evidence rows keyed by (query_entity, gold_entity).
